name: Weekly Throughput
query: SELECT date_trunc('week', full_date)::date AS week_start_date, SUM(value) AS total_completed FROM metrics.v_facts WHERE calc_code = 'throughput_count' AND slice_rule_name IS NULL [[ AND project_key = {{project_key}} ]] [[ AND full_date >= {{date_from}} ]] [[ AND full_date <= {{date_to}} ]] GROUP BY date_trunc('week', full_date)::date ORDER BY week_start_date
